---
title: "The Rev. George Hunn Nobbs"
---

## The Rev. George Hunn Nobbs

**Dates:** (1799-1884)

### Description

chaplain to the Pitcairn community on Norfolk Island

### Letters

- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from December 21, 1868.
- Letter from April 12th [1867?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
